title: SharpHound Collection from Compromised Windows Host
description: This runbook operationalizes SharpHound Collection from Compromised Windows Host using #import-module , #invoke-bloodhound . It is designed for repeatable, high-signal execution in authorized OSCP/CPTS-style assessments. Collects AD graph data on Windows footholds for BloodHound path analysis.
shortDescription: SharpHound Collection from Compromised Windows Host

metadata.descriptionHtml:
This runbook operationalizes SharpHound Collection from Compromised Windows Host using #import-module , #invoke-bloodhound. It is designed for repeatable, high-signal execution in authorized OSCP/CPTS-style assessments.

Collects AD graph data on Windows footholds for BloodHound path analysis.

  1. Prepare scope and access: validate target reachability and select low-noise execution order.
  2. Execute core workflow: run the command chain to produce actionable security outcomes.
  3. Validate and operationalize output: confirm results, capture artifacts, and prepare follow-on actions.
  • Tool Location/Source: primary references are in local source corpus entries linked from runbook-list.md; e.g., docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/BlessedRebuS-OSCP-Pentesting-Cheatsheet/README.md:1360; docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/BlessedRebuS-OSCP-Pentesting-Cheatsheet/README.md:1366.
  • Attack pre-requisite: authorized scope, operator shell access, and protocol reachability on TCP 80, TCP 443.
  • What attacker gain: validated findings (access paths, credentials, execution context, or exposure evidence) enabling faster compromise progression.
  • Detection/Defense opsec: monitor abnormal auth/enumeration bursts, enforce least privilege and hardening baselines, and alert on repeated tool-pattern telemetry.

Core Commands:

Import-Module .\\SharpHound.ps1
Invoke-BloodHound -CollectionMethod All -OutputDirectory <PATH> -OutputPrefix "audit"
Invoke-BloodHound -CollectionMethod All -OutputDirectory <location> -OutputPrefix "name"
extraInfo: primary references are in local source corpus entries linked from runbook-list.md ; e.g., docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/BlessedRebuS-OSCP-Pentesting-Cheatsheet/README.md:1360; docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/BlessedRebuS-OSCP-Pentesting-Cheatsheet/README.md:1366 .
